milestones.objective: Stabilize TheStartupBench as a serious internal benchmark candidate.
success_targets: strategy hidden pack broadened further across long-horizon tracks
calibration execution moved into active planning
operator calibration completed for promoted packs

milestones.objective: Ship a defensible public benchmark release.

tasks.title: Establish benchmark task system
completion_criteria: docs link to the task system

tasks.title: Expand hidden test corpus to at least 50 scenarios
completion_criteria: growth is balanced across thin tracks
tasks.progress_notes: Current hidden test inventory is 50 active scenarios across strategy, coverage, operator, real-world, and canary packs.

tasks.title: Broaden strategy pack across long-horizon tracks
completion_criteria: strategy pack covers board, product, scale, and gtm
each added family has fresh/test variants
strategy hidden suite remains distinct and valid
tasks.progress_notes: Now covers board, product, scale, and gtm with valid hidden test and fresh variants across promoted long-horizon families.

tasks.title: Run operator calibration wave 002 for promoted strategy families
completion_criteria: promoted strategy scenarios reviewed by operators
tasks.progress_notes: Wave-002 strategy suite, study manifest, launcher, reviewer outreach, compilation helper, live study run, reviewer assignments, and exported founder/product/ops packets now exist. Task stays in progress until real operator reviews are collected and disagreements are logged.

tasks.title: Freeze one official evaluation reporting window
completion_criteria: window start and end dates documented
tasks.progress_notes: The first official reporting window is frozen for 2026-03-15 through 2026-04-12 with a validated official-eval-window artifact, hosted vs self-reported reporting rules, and the active frozen pack set synced to current versions.

tasks.title: Publish leaderboard governance pack
completion_criteria: release note and retirement rules documented
tasks.progress_notes: A versioned governance pack now defines hosted, self-reported, and reference-baseline entry types, contamination response handling, release-note triggers, and retirement rules tied to the current official evaluation window.

tasks.title: Define hidden pack rotation policy
tasks.progress_notes: A versioned hidden-pack rotation policy now defines fresh refresh cadence, test-window boundary rules, retirement triggers, fresh-to-test promotion requirements, and the required metadata updates for pack rotation events.

tasks.title: Add second 0to1 ambiguity expansion batch
completion_criteria: at least 3 new hidden 0to1 scenarios exist
test and fresh coverage both expand

tasks.title: Add scale-finance interaction strategy family
completion_criteria: hidden test and fresh variants exist
strategy pack metadata and tests are updated

tasks.title: Add strategy depth batch 001 toward hidden test 60
completion_criteria: at least 3 new hidden strategy test scenarios exist
strategy pack metadata and tests are updated
tasks.progress_notes: Strategy hidden coverage now includes board hiring truth, delayed-consequence product platform tax, and GTM efficiency sequencing. Active strategy hidden test inventory is 13 and benchmark-wide hidden test inventory is 53.

tasks.title: Add canary depth batch 001
completion_criteria: at least 2 new hidden canary scenarios exist
canary suite and manifests are updated
tasks.progress_notes: The canary pack now includes treasury-shuffle and renewal-nudge exploit traps, bringing active canary hidden test inventory to 4 and benchmark-wide hidden test inventory to 55.

tasks.title: Add real-world depth batch 001
completion_criteria: at least 2 new hidden real-world scenarios exist
real-world suite and manifests are updated
tasks.progress_notes: The real-world pack now includes hidden Airbnb demand-shock and Robinhood volatility-outage variants, bringing active real-world hidden test inventory to 10 and benchmark-wide hidden test inventory to 57.

tasks.title: Publish external benchmark adoption pack
completion_criteria: hosted vs self-reported path is documented for external users
tasks.progress_notes: A schema-backed external adoption pack now defines hosted-reference, self-reported, and local-reference paths with explicit non-claims so outside use can grow without overstating benchmark maturity.

tasks.title: Expand hidden test corpus to at least 75 scenarios
completion_criteria: growth is balanced across thin tracks
promotion metadata and governance docs are updated
tasks.progress_notes: Active hidden test inventory is now 70 after the operator hidden pack grew to 22 scenarios via procurement-slip, vendor-prepay, and escalation-load families.

tasks.title: Compile operator calibration wave 002 returns
completion_criteria: returned review CSV files are imported

tasks.title: Add canary depth batch 002
completion_criteria: at least 2 new hidden canary scenarios exist
canary suite and manifests are updated
tasks.progress_notes: The canary pack now includes launch-surge and experiment-vanity exploit traps, bringing active canary hidden test inventory to 6 and benchmark-wide hidden test inventory to 65.

tasks.title: Add real-world depth batch 002
completion_criteria: at least 2 new hidden real-world scenarios exist
real-world suite and manifests are updated
tasks.progress_notes: The real-world pack now includes WeWork burn-reset and Instacart capacity-surge hidden variants, bringing active real-world hidden test inventory to 12 and benchmark-wide hidden test inventory to 67.

tasks.title: Add operator depth batch 002
completion_criteria: at least 3 new hidden operator scenarios exist
operator suite and manifests are updated
tasks.progress_notes: The operator pack now includes procurement-slip, vendor-prepay, and escalation-load hidden variants, bringing active operator hidden test inventory to 22 and benchmark-wide hidden test inventory to 70.
